caption: A camera pans slowly into a spacious, modern dining area from behind an open reddish-brown wooden door. The room features polished, light-colored tiled floors that reflect the overhead lighting and a large dining set consisting of a dark rectangular table surrounded by six white chairs. In the background, gold-colored curtains frame a window, and a minimalist chandelier with several small bulbs hangs above the table. As the perspective shifts, a brown leather sofa and a small coffee table become visible in a connected living space to the right. The walls are painted an off-white color, and the room is brightly lit. No people are present in the scene. The sequence captures a steady transition moving further into the room, revealing more of the interior layout and furniture.
